title: The plumb bob finds true vertical by gravity alone — no algorithm, no check, no human judgment. Precept finds the one valid state the same way: the structure of the definition makes any other result impossible. Same definition, same data, same outcome: as inevitable as a weight falling.
conceptualBridge: The plumb line means Precept's outcomes are structurally inevitable because the definition, like gravity, permits only one true result from the same inputs.
decision: Removed: avg 3.9 below the 4.0 threshold; determinism metaphor is one step removed from Precept's core differentiators.
